name: The Salt-Rimed Tankard (Dockside Tavern)
dmNotes: The informant, Wick, is at the corner table. He bolts if a fight breaks out.
scriptText: Rain hammers the shutters as you shoulder through the door. The room is close and smoke-thick, a dozen conversations dropping to a murmur as they clock the newcomers. {{sfx:slam}} A one-eyed man in the corner lifts his tankard a careful inch — Wick, your informant. As you cross the floor, a chair scrapes back and a drunk dockhand steps into your path. {{music:brawl}} {{sfx:blade}}
